last_action: Implemented secure, encrypted Secret Management via Database with Admin UI; added Phone Number column and renamed Manage Residents button in Dashboard.
summary: Phase 14: UX Optimization & Scalability. Implemented pagination for Lease Management and Tenant History. Enhanced the Entry Payment Flex Message with 'Download QR Code' and clear account info. Added a 'Phone Number' column to the Active Tenants list and renamed the 'Manage Residents' button to 'Co-residents' for better clarity. Successfully migrated all sensitive API keys from .env/Code to an encrypted database storage system (AES/Fernet), now manageable via 'Advanced Settings' in the Admin Dashboard with dynamic refreshing.
next_steps: Conduct a full end-to-end test of the pro-rata billing cycle with actual meter readings.
Implement a CSV/PDF export feature for the Tenant History and Settlement records.
Enhance the Admin Dashboard with more detailed financial analytics and revenue charts.
